outfit_info.outfit_description: A young boy sports a functional yet stylish ensemble featuring a colorblocked hooded jacket in green and navy. Paired with patched straight jeans and sturdy hiking boots, the outfit is practical for chilly weather adventures. A light beige t-shirt provides a soft inner layer, creating a cohesive, active, and playful outdoor look.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a slender build and focused expression, appearing ready for exploration.
model_attributes.pose: Standing frontally, right arm extended, index finger pointing forward, gaze directed towards the front.
model_attributes.background: A misty, fantastical market scene with vendors, distant buildings, and floating structures under a hazy sky.

outfit.P00847443: multicoloured faux leather and mesh boots
